visuals.title: Virtual Machine Architecture
visuals.description: Diagram comparing Type 1 and Type 2 hypervisor architectures with VMs running on top

diagrams.title: Hypervisor Architecture Comparison
steps: Type 1: Hypervisor runs directly on hardware
Type 1: VMs with guest OSes run on hypervisor
Type 2: Host OS runs on hardware
Type 2: Hypervisor runs as application on host OS
Type 2: VMs with guest OSes run on hypervisor
diagrams.notes: Type 1 is used in enterprise/cloud (ESXi, Hyper-V). Type 2 is used for development/testing (VirtualBox, VMware Workstation).
